activities_projects.title: Ratio Comparison
activities_projects.objective: Understand proportional ratios using cross multiplication
steps: Write two ratios such as 6:3 and 4:2
Check if the products are equal

activities_projects.title: Map Distance Activity
activities_projects.objective: Learn map scale and representative fraction
steps: Find the scale written on the map
Measure distance between two cities with a ruler
Calculate the real distance using the scale

activities_projects.title: Spice Mix Ratio
activities_projects.objective: Understand ratios with more than two terms
steps: Reduce the ratio by dividing by 2

activities_projects.title: Paint Mixing
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Applies ratio concept in real situations

activities_projects.title: Divide a Quantity
activities_projects.objective: Learn dividing a number in a given ratio
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands division of quantities in ratios

activities_projects.title: Triangle Angle Ratio
activities_projects.objective: Understand angles of a triangle in ratio

activities_projects.title: Pie Chart Drawing
activities_projects.objective: Understand representation of data using pie charts
steps: Draw and colour a pie chart

activities_projects.title: Speed and Time Table
steps: Write speeds such as 30 km/h and 60 km/h
Find the time taken for the same distance

activities_projects.title: Workers and Days
activities_projects.objective: Apply inverse proportion in real life
steps: Assume 20 workers complete work in 4 days
Calculate days needed if workers reduce to 10

activities_projects.title: Pump Filling Tank
steps: Write problem with 2 pumps filling tank in 18 hours
Find time if pumps increase to 4
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands inverse proportion in work problems
